title: Classic Data Engineering
description: The traditional data engineering toolkit. Independent best-in-class tools the agent must wire together: dbt for transformations, polars for dataframes, great-expectations for data quality.
installScript: pip3 install --no-cache-dir dbt-core==1.10.19 dbt-postgres==1.10.0 dbt-clickhouse==1.10.0 polars==1.38.1 great-expectations==1.13.0
